svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 20px; margin-left: 500px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 245, 233), rgb(21, 33, 22)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(76, 175, 80), rgb(50, 135, 54));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 130px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
<<Generic>>
Node<K, V>- key: K
- value: V
- prev: Optional<Node>
- next: Optional<Node>+ __init__(key: K, value: V)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 249, 196), rgb(33, 28, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(251, 192, 45), rgb(120, 69, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 305px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 330px; margin-left: 291px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
LRUStrategy- _head: Optional<Node>
- _tail: Optional<Node>
- _node_map: Dict[Any, Node]- _remove_node(node: Node)
- _add_to_front(node: Node)
+ access(key, node)
+ add(key, node)
+ evict() → Any
+ remove(key)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 243, 224), rgb(36, 26, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(255, 152, 0), rgb(175, 87, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 330px; margin-left: 541px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
LFUStrategy- _freq_map: Dict[int, set]
- _key_freq: Dict[Any, int]
- _min_freq: int+ access(key, node)
+ add(key, node)
+ evict() → Any
+ remove(key)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 243, 224), rgb(36, 26, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(255, 152, 0), rgb(175, 87, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 335px; margin-left: 791px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
TTLStrategy- _default_ttl: int
- _expiry_map: Dict[Any, float]+ access(key, node)
+ add(key, node)
+ evict() → Any
+ remove(key)
+ is_expired(key) → bool

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(227, 242, 253), rgb(20, 33, 42)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(33, 150, 243), rgb(38, 139, 219));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 555px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
<<Generic>>
Cache<K, V>- _capacity: int
- _strategy: EvictionStrategy
- _cache: Dict[K, Node]+ get(key: K) → Optional[V]
+ put(key: K, value: V)
+ remove(key: K) → bool
+ clear()
+ size: int (property)
+ capacity: int (property)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(243, 229, 245), rgb(45, 33, 47)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(156, 39, 176), rgb(245, 144, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 555px; margin-left: 321px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
CacheStats- _hits: int
- _misses: int
- _evictions: int+ record_hit()
+ record_miss()
+ record_eviction()
+ hit_rate: float (property)
+ report() → str

div.div:
CacheWithStats- _cache: Cache
- _stats: CacheStats+ get(key) → Optional[V]
+ put(key, value)
+ remove(key) → bool
+ clear()
+ stats: CacheStats (property)

ThreadSafeCache- _lock: RLock
- _cache: Cache+ get(key) → Optional[V]
+ put(key, value)
+ remove(key) → bool
+ clear()

Legend
━━━ Solid: Inheritance (<<extends>>)
- - - Dashed: Uses / Composes
